commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete deploy sglang-prefill sglang-decode sglang-lb --ignore-not-found --wait=false 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete svc sglang-prefill sglang-decode sglang-lb --ignore-not-found --wait=false 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete job model-prefetch node-cleanup-160 --ignore-not-found --wait=false 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete pod --all --ignore-not-found --wait=false 2>&1 | head -40'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation get pods 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl describe node ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal | grep -A3 "Allocated resources" | head -15; echo ---; kubectl describe node ip-10-1-12-221.us-east-2.compute.internal | grep -A3 "Allocated resources" | head -15'
